response.justification: While Bogdan brings valuable geospatial data experience (GISCollective, Green Map) and strong engineering fundamentals with proven testing discipline, there is a significant gap in the primary requirement: modern C++ development. Recent work (2015-present) has focused on TypeScript/JavaScript and web/product engineering rather than systems infrastructure. The 6-12 months of dedicated C++ experience ending ~2015 is insufficient for a senior-level role in a performance-critical routing pipeline, though the candidate's demonstrated ability to master diverse technologies and willingness to expand expertise could be mitigating factors.
strengths: Deep geospatial data platform experience (GISCollective, Green Map) directly relevant to routing and mapping domains
Strong testing and quality assurance mindset with TDD background and proven ability to build reliable systems
Versatile engineer who quickly masters new technologies across multiple domains and demonstrates willingness to expand expertise
concerns: Minimal recent C++ experience—last significant C++ work ended ~2015; primary requirement is modern C++ development
Recent career trajectory focused on product and web engineering (TypeScript, React, AWS) rather than systems-level infrastructure and pipeline work
No demonstrated experience with navigation routing pipelines, traffic data integration, or tile generation systems at scale

key_factors.factor: Recent focus on web/product vs systems infrastructure
